div.p: Connection flow when receiver buffer fills

g.text: Red = Zero window (blocked) | Green = Window open (flowing) | Dashed = Probe segment
T4: App reads data, window opens

text.tspan: // Receiver: buffer full, advertise zero window
// Receiver: buffer full, advertise zero window
// Probe elicits ACK with current window
// Probe elicits ACK with current window
// Data in flight - arm retransmit timer
// Data in flight - arm retransmit timer
// WRONG: Send full segment as probe
// WRONG: Send full segment as probe
// If probe is lost, persist timer fires again
// No special handling needed - just retry
// Receiver will eventually send window update
// If probe is lost, persist timer fires again
// No special handling needed - just retry
// Receiver will eventually send window update
// If window update ACK is lost:
// - Or application read triggers new ACK
// If window update ACK is lost:
// - Or application read triggers new ACK
